# Auto Builder Input Checklist

## Required before build
- [ ] business objective is explicit
- [ ] workflow boundary is explicit
- [ ] delivery level chosen
- [ ] operators identified
- [ ] connectors identified
- [ ] source of truth defined
- [ ] write destinations defined
- [ ] backup path defined
- [ ] blocker rules defined
- [ ] quarantine rules defined
- [ ] acceptance criteria defined
- [ ] canonical names locked
- [ ] runtime schedule defined
- [ ] env variables listed
- [ ] UI requirements listed
- [ ] data objects defined
- [ ] success metrics defined

## Build should not start if missing
- unique keys
- approval rules
- final write permissions
- recovery owner
- alert recipient
